共建美好体验

助力业务增长与用户价值创造
hero.bottomRightDesc:
带领团队打造美团设计体系与平台能力
通过设计驱动产品创新与业务增长
为数亿用户提供更好的体验

about.description:
我是于磊，美团平台设计中心负责人。长期专注于平台型体验、设计体系与增长设计，致力于通过设计连接用户与业务，推动产品创新、效率提升与商业增长。
我带领团队建设平台设计能力，协同产品、运营与技术，将复杂业务问题转化为清晰、高质量的用户体验，为数亿用户提供更顺畅、更有价值的服务。
about.title: About

experiences.role: 美团用户增长与运营设计（专业+业务线）
experiences.description:
28人团队
拉齐美团各业务线营销与设计标准，提升营销体验与一致性，打通美团会员核心交易场景设计体验，并结合AI手段提效。

experiences.role: 即时零售创意营销设计（专业+业务线）
experiences.description:
26人团队
负责外卖、闪购、医药业务创意营销、营销体验、品牌设计，提质效、提体验、降成本。

experiences.role: 拼好饭与外卖增长设计（业务线）
experiences.description:
16人团队
负责拼好饭与外卖增长设计体验、创意营销、品牌设计，探索期与成长期产品紧跟业务节奏，打品牌、提升体验降万服，促增长。

experiences.role: 到家品牌营销设计（专业线）
experiences.description:
30人团队
负责外卖、闪购、履约品牌与创意营销设计，提质量、提效率、降成本。
负责网易彩票、网易火车票、网易电影票体验与营销设计。

services.description: As a web designer, I specialize in creating engaging, user-centric websites and visual experiences that reflect your brand's unique identity. My expertise spans a range of key design services, each aimed at delivering beautiful, functional, and effective digital solutions.

steps.title: DESIGN AND EXECUTION
steps.description: I start by getting to know you and your business in depth. Through an in-depth consultation, I find out your goals, target audience, and unique value proposition. I then conduct comprehensive market research and competitor analysis to inform our strategy.

steps.title: CREATIVE CONCEPTING
steps.description: I collaborate with you to set clear, attainable objectives that align with your business goals. Together, we create a strategic plan that details the project timeline, key milestones, and deliverables, ensuring transparency and clarity throughout the entire process.

steps.title: STRATEGY DEVELOPMENT
steps.description: As a designer, I bring ideas to life with a keen attention to detail, creating visually impressive and functional elements. I present design iterations to you for review and make adjustments based on your wishes, all processes are transparent.

steps.title: DISCOVERY
steps.description: Understanding Your Vision: We start by getting to know you and your business. Through detailed consultations, we uncover your goals, target audience, and unique selling points. Research and Analysis: We conduct thorough market research and competitor analysis to inform our strategy and ensure your design stands out.
